---
name: Strategy or feature request
about: Add or improve a model strategy, or propose a feature
title: "[Strategy] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Which model family**
e.g. Anthropic Claude / OpenAI GPT / a new vendor.

**What is distinctive**
What genuinely differs for this model that the strategy should exploit — not generic
advice that applies to every model.

**Official source**
Link to the vendor's official prompt-engineering or model documentation supporting the
change. Please confirm the link resolves.

**Proposed change**
The concrete rule(s) to add or edit. Keep it short and model-specific (see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
